nasb.text: But we did not yield in subjection to them for even an hour, so that the truth of the gospel would remain with you.

esv.text: to them we did not yield in submission even for a moment, so that the truth of the gospel might be preserved for you.

cnv.text: 對這些人，我們一點也沒有讓步妥協，為了要使福音的真理存留在你們中間。

ccb.text: 但为了叫福音的真理常在你们当中，我们丝毫没有向他们妥协。

csbs.text: 我们对这些人，一刻也没有屈服妥协，好使福音的真理在你们中间继续存留。
